logic: n10=floor(A/10); n2=ceil((A-10*n10)/2) if A-10*n10>0 else 0; add n10 FONDO10+COL_FONDO10(base)+FIN10+COL_FIN10(base) + n2 KIT2+COL_KIT2(base)

n10=floor(A/10); n2=ceil((A-10*n10)/2) if A-10*n10>0 else 0; add n10 FONDO10+COL_FONDO10(base) + 2*n10 FIN10 + COL_FIN10(base)*n10 + COL_FIN10(contrast)*n10 + n2 KIT2 + COL_KIT2(color1=base,color2=contrast)
n10=floor(A/10); n2=ceil((A-10*n10)/2) if A-10*n10>0 else 0; add n10 FONDO10+COL_FONDO10+FIN10+COL_FIN10 + n2 KIT2+COL_KIT2
n10=floor(A/10); n2=ceil((A-10*n10)/2) if A-10*n10>0 else 0; add n10 FONDO10+COL_FONDO10+FIN10+COL_FIN10 + n2 KIT2+COL_KIT2; DOC=NO
n10=floor(A/10); n2=ceil((A-10*n10)/2) if A-10*n10>0 else 0; add n10 FONDO10(pattern)+MAIN10(pattern)+n2 KIT2(pattern)
n4=floor(A/4); n1=A-4*n4; add n4 KIT4_CHROMO + n1 KIT1_CHROMO
n4=floor(A/4); n1=A-4*n4; add n4 KIT4_EVIDENCE + n1 KIT1_EVIDENCE; constraint color2!=color1
n10=floor(A/10); n2=ceil((A-10*n10)/2) if A-10*n10>0 else 0; add n10 MAIN10 + n2 KIT2; DOC=NO
kg=A*0.25; n1kg=ceil(kg/1); add n1kg COLOR_1KG; note SUPERFICIALE
